name: IRON CREEK LAKE CAMPGROUND AND STORE

violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food with bare hands. -Employee sliced and buttered bun without gloves.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sani Bucket found at 25ppm Chlorine and cloudy.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -Some frost build up at interior of chest freezer. -Some food spill/debris in toaster oven.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Food contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in good repair or sound condition. -Metal measuring scoop does not have a handle and is left in/used as scoop for ice.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Single use plates and bowls are not stored inverted at top shelf in kitchen.
Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. -Four packages of patty hamburgers are open air thawing at counter top.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — ---Sani Bucket found at 50ppm Chlorine. *Maintain at 100ppm solution.--Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. -Sani sink found at 100ppm chlorine. *Maintain at 50ppm Chlorine solution.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Staff used hand sink to rinse blender pitcher.
Proper storage, labeling, use (3 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
